Hello

A paragraph of plain text. This site is built with `nvim -l` and `vim.treesitter`, served by `vim.uv`.

Subheading

Another paragraph. Edit this file and the page should reload automatically.

local function hello()
  print("code block")
end

A deeper heading

One more paragraph to wrap things up.

def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"hello, {name}"

print(greet("world"))
